issue_title: [preact/hooks] useMemo keeps recalculating even when the dependency is not changed
issue_body_preview:
- [ ] Check if updating to the latest Preact version resolves the issue

**Describe the bug**
When using the useMemo hook to calculate a value and then using this value to conditionally update the state during render, the app indefinitely re-renders. Something like shown below

```js
const [va
test_description_zh: 在 Preact 组件中使用 useMemo 计算一个值，并在渲染过程中根据该 memo 值有条件地调用 setState 更新状态。观察组件是否正常渲染并停止更新，而非陷入无限重渲染循环。
expected_result_zh: 组件在依赖项未变化时，useMemo 应返回缓存的值，不会触发多余的重渲染。页面应正常渲染并稳定，不会出现无限循环导致的页面卡死或浏览器无响应。
